Issue: Dependency conflicts during CXR-LLAVA model integration
Decision: Building a multi-agent chest X-ray analysis system with CXR-LLAVA as the base model
Rationale: Using specialized agents (Device Detection, Serious Flagging, Confidence Assignment) for focused analysis tasks to improve accuracy and efficiency
Author: shauryaq05
Description: Multi-agent chest X-ray analysis system with CXR-LLAVA base model and three specialized agents
Risk: System crashes when one agent fails

Argument.author: shauryaq05
Argument.argument: Using specialized agents (Device Detection, Serious Flagging, Confidence Assignment) is better than a single monolithic model because it allows focused analysis tasks and improves accuracy and efficiency

Argument.author: shauryaq05
Argument.argument: CXR-LLAVA integration faces dependency conflicts (PyTorch/Transformers version issues) which must be resolved to proceed
